$comment: Layer A for SENIOR vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Generated ages span both sides of the 65 threshold and amounts span the PIC 9(7)V99 range, so the SET-flag gate and the discount rounding are exercised by seeded random inputs alone.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SENIOR (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-senior)
